plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow School Van to track your location in the background to update parents during trips.

infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: This app requires access to your location to share your transit journey with parents.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: This app requires background location access to broadcast your van's coordinates while driving.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: This app requires background location access to stream coordinates to parents.
